element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Defines player philosophy and long-term strategic direction
Foundation for territory control and resource gathering
Unlocks new units, facilities, and strategic capabilities

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Early-mid game as other factions establish
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Alliance formation, trade, espionage, and conflict negotiation

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Mid game as territorial disputes emerge
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Warfare becomes primary tension mechanism in competitive play

element_introduction_order.element: Planet's native life and environmental hazards
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Environmental hostility becomes formidable obstacle alongside faction competition
Population management and internal faction stability

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Mid-late game races for competitive advantage
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: High-stakes infrastructure competitions that shift power balance

element_introduction_order.element: Progenitor artifacts and alien intervention (Alien Crossfire)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Mid-late game lore discovery and gameplay mechanics
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Reveals existential stakes and introduces non-human faction competitors

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Late game as primary antagonistic force
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Planet itself becomes dominant challenge requiring new strategic approaches

typical_relief_triggers: Secret project completed before rival factions
typical_tension_triggers: Rival faction expansion into adjacent territory
Hostile military unit or faction emergence
Diplomatic demands or ultimatums from rivals
Native life attack or environmental disaster
Secret project race - opponent close to completion
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based cyclical tension with escalating stakes; early game focuses on peaceful expansion and research, mid-game introduces military and diplomatic conflict, late-game dominated by high-stakes competition for secret projects and dominance while Planet itself becomes adversary

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Unexplored map regions and hidden Progenitor artifacts provide discovery incentive
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Progenitor monoliths and artifacts scattered across planet; hidden until encountered or revealed through technology

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like faction establishment; peaceful expansion and technology research; minimal direct conflict
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Territorial disputes emerge; military unit customization becomes necessary; faction diplomacy intensifies; first major competitive races for advantages
difficulty_curve.late_game: Exponential escalation: secret project races, planetary sentience as primary antagonist, non-human faction involvement (Crossfire), multiple simultaneous victory conditions creating tension between collaboration and competition
notable_spikes: First hostile faction encounter - shift from peaceful to military thinking
Rival secret project race - sudden high-stakes time pressure
Planet's sentience awakening - introduces unpredictable environmental threat
Alien Crossfire non-human faction arrival - complete paradigm shift in available opponents and goals

notable_level_patterns.description: Game structure mirrors chosen faction ideology; each faction excels in specific game aspects and follows distinct philosophical belief system affecting available strategies and win conditions
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early-mid game faction development and technology tree specialization

notable_level_patterns.description: Player must manage simultaneous challenges from rival factions, native planet life, environmental hazards, and (in late game) planetary sentience itself
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid-late game where diplomatic, military, environmental, and existential threats converge

notable_level_patterns.description: Technology tree unlocks new capabilities, units, and strategic options; research priority directly affects competitive advantage and available tactics
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Throughout entire game - continuous research-driven unlocking

notable_level_patterns.description: Late game dominated by races to complete unique secret projects that provide massive strategic advantages; creates temporal pressure and alliance-breaking moments
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid-late game convergence where multiple factions compete for limited project resources
